My Tech World: Technology & Computers Vocabulary Pack
LanternELLCover📄 Printable Pack
EN-ES Printable Resource

My Tech World: Technology & Computers Vocabulary Pack

An engaging vocabulary pack designed for 3rd-5th grade ELL newcomer students, focusing on essential technology and computer terms. Includes a mini-book and interactive worksheets.

TopicTechnology & Computers
Age Band3-5
Pack Typevocabulary pack
LanguageEN-ES

✨ What's Inside

  • 14 vocabulary items
  • 3 worksheets
  • Mini-book (8 pages)
  • Teacher notes & answer key

📖 How to Use

Introduce vocabulary using the mini-book and flashcards (printable from vocabulary list). Use the matching worksheet for initial vocabulary acquisition, the tracing worksheet for spelling and recognition practice, and the coloring worksheet for creative reinforcement. Encourage students to share their experiences with technology.

LanternELLMini-Book 1/2📄 Printable Pack

Mini-Book: My Tech World / Mi Mundo Tecnológico

Print double-sided, fold in half, and staple to create a mini-book.

1
My Tech World
Mi Mundo Tecnológico
2
This is a computer. We use it to learn and play.
Esta es una computadora. La usamos para aprender y jugar.
3
The screen shows us pictures and words. It helps us see!
La pantalla nos muestra imágenes y palabras. ¡Nos ayuda a ver!
4
We type on the keyboard. We click with the mouse.
Escribimos en el teclado. Hacemos clic con el ratón.
Mar 18, 2026lanternell.comPage 6 / 14
LanternELLMini-Book 2/2📄 Printable Pack
5
The internet connects us to the world. We can find many things online.
El internet nos conecta con el mundo. Podemos encontrar muchas cosas en línea.
6
Tablets and smartphones are small computers. We can carry them with us.
Las tabletas y los teléfonos inteligentes son computadoras pequeñas. Podemos llevarlos con nosotros.
7
We can print pictures with a printer. We listen to music with speakers or headphones.
Podemos imprimir imágenes con una impresora. Escuchamos música con altavoces o auriculares.
8
Technology helps us every day! It makes our lives easier and more fun.
¡La tecnología nos ayuda todos los días! Hace nuestras vidas más fáciles y divertidas.

LanternELLTeacher Notes📄 Printable Pack

Teacher Notes

🎯 Objective

Students will be able to identify and name common technology and computer-related vocabulary in English and Spanish, and understand their basic functions.

💡 Suggested Use

Introduce vocabulary using the mini-book and flashcards (printable from vocabulary list). Use the matching worksheet for initial vocabulary acquisition, the tracing worksheet for spelling and recognition practice, and the coloring worksheet for creative reinforcement. Encourage students to share their experiences with technology.

📦 Materials Needed

  • Printed vocabulary list (for flashcards)
  • Printed mini-book (one per student)
  • Printed worksheets (one set per student)
  • Crayons or colored pencils
  • Scissors (for mini-book)
  • Glue or stapler (for mini-book)

🔀 Differentiation Tips

  • Support: Pair students with stronger English speakers, provide realia or larger pictures of technology items, pre-teach words with gestures, allow students to use L1 for initial understanding.
  • Challenge: Ask students to create simple sentences using the new vocabulary, describe how they use a specific technology item, or draw their own 'future technology' and label it.

ws-1

1.computadora

7.teléfono inteligente
8.impresora
9.altavoz
10.auriculares
11.cámara
12.sitio web
13.correo electrónico
14.robot

ws-2

No specific answer key needed as it's a tracing activity. Students should accurately trace the words.

LanternELLAnswer Key 2📄 Printable Pack

Answer Key

ws-3

No specific answer key needed for coloring. Students should correctly write the English word next to each corresponding picture: 1. computer, 2. smartphone, 3. printer, 4. headphones, 5. robot, 6. camera.
